changeSet.author: matthias
changeSet.comment: Pre-1.98.1 run / no-context seed: roles, permissions, system properties, app configs, the Organisation reference list, sysadmin/system users, batch sequences.

changeSet.author: matthias

preConditions.onFailMessage: dev-test seed skipped: not a fresh install (schema already advanced past 1.98.1)
preConditions.onErrorMessage: dev-test seed skipped: not a fresh install
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DATABASECHANGELOG WHERE FILENAME NOT LIKE '%initial-seed-changeLog.xml'

changeSet.comment: Pre-1.98.1 dev-test seed: test users (user1a-user9i), their api keys, role assignments, and dev-test overrides of run-seed system-property values.

changeSet.author: matthias

preConditions.onFailMessage: cloud seed skipped: not a fresh install (existing role ids differ from the seeded -1..-4)
preConditions.onErrorMessage: cloud seed skipped: not a fresh install
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DATABASECHANGELOG WHERE FILENAME NOT LIKE '%initial-seed-changeLog.xml'

changeSet.comment: Community edition only: grant RECORD:SHARE to the four base roles (Admin/User/PI/Sysadmin), as the original changeLog-0.22 (2015) did.
